## Key Survey Insights (for deliverable context)

- **Biggest segments**: EdTech, consultants/freelancers — these are the primary audience
- **Growth opportunities**: HR/L&D, journalism, policy — underrepresented but interested
- **Event types requested**: Panels, happy hours, co-working, hackathons, workshops, AI-focused events, debates, women-specific events, running group
- **Communication preference**: Email strong; quarterly newsletter recommended
- **Volunteer signups**: Neighborhood ambassadors (strong interest), connectors, greeters, facilitators
- **14 connectors** already signed up for virtual/in-person connection facilitation
